text.tspan: Local knowledge-pack import and optional RAG sync
[Older synced file exists and replacement is active]
Failed imports are ledgered. Recovery retries failed and timeout jobs.

svg.text: Validate non-empty file, extension, 25 MB controller limit
Upsert project_ai_resources when env ids are absent
Validate strict or partial structured pack
Upsert curriculum, task bank, misconceptions, lesson plans
Record source path, hash, and import ledger
Attach new file to vector store
Insert active knowledge_files row and mark indexed only after completed
Insert indexing knowledge_files row and keep job attached
Remove old file from vector store
Supersede detached paths removed from pack
